name: scotch-catalog-pipeline
description: One-time / re-runnable build tool: downloads CC0 furniture assets from Poly Haven, normalizes them (recenter, floor-align, weld/dedupe), and emits vendored GLBs + catalog.json consumed by services/api. Not part of the runtime app.

scripts.build: npm run download && npm run download-kenney && npm run normalize && npm run download-env
